programme.desc: Dallas is a woman with a past who has been driven out of town by the high-minded ladies of the community. Lucy Mallory is the wife of a cavalry officer stationed in Lordsburg, and she's determined to be with him. Hatfield is a smooth-talking cardsharp who claims to be along to "protect" Lucy, although he seems to have romantic intentions. Dr. Boone is a self-styled philosopher, drunkard and physician who's been stripped of his license. Mr. Peacock is a nervous whiskey salesman. Gatewood is a crooked banker who needs to get out of town. Buck is the hayseed stage driver, and Sheriff Wilcox is along to offer protection and keep an eye peeled for the Ringo Kid, a well-known outlaw who has just broken out of jail. While Wilcox does find Ringo, a principled man who gives himself up without a fight, the real danger lies farther down the trail, where a band of Apaches, led by Geronimo, could attack at any time.

programme.title: The Surfing Lifestyle Ep104: In Search of Perfect Waves
programme.desc: A key component of The Surfing Lifestyle is to venture to lesser travelled parts of the world in search of perfect waves, and Dru Adler, Adam Bennetts and their surfboard shaper Daniel MacDonald, did exactly that in southern Sumatra where they found uncrowded perfection and adventure around every turn.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: The episode opens with Michael Bellemare of Switch It Up Inc., who shares how a simple bar-napkin sketch grew into a million-dollar operation specializing in turnkey solar, LED lighting, and EV charging. With a passion for revitalizing the trades, Michael stresses the importance of training programs and investing in people as he maps out his goal of scaling to a $100M company—and even explores franchising with Kevin. Next, teacher-turned-inventor Sean Worthington introduces Raida Tech, where a bathtub question—“What is money?”—led to a new form of data-supremacy currency and safer, uncensored AI. Sean looks to the A-Team for marketing, sales, and customer acquisition support. Then, Dale Krueger of Tangible Assets LLC explains how his coin-collecting hobby evolved into an investment platform blending art and assets, now ready to scale beyond word-of-mouth investors. Finally, Richard Simon of New Home National Title showcases his on-call title insurance service and seeks guidance on breaking into TV advertising to reach homebuyers nationwide.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: It’s overhaul day on Boom America, and the A-Team gets to work. Kevin Harrington and Toli Cefail kick things off with Switch It Up, laying out strategies around “The Volume” while Kyle Reyes pushes for a powerful pivot—refocusing the company squarely on the booming trades community. Next, the team digs into Raida Tech, where Laura highlights how the company is operating 25 years ahead of the curve but desperately needs clearer marketing to match its groundbreaking innovation. American Stories creator Bob Cefail stops by to share the inspiration behind Boom America and the future of independent production in the U.S. From there, the A-Team turns to Tangible Assets, helping refine how Dale can monetize his coin collection business, boost credibility, and reach the right investors. Finally, New Home National Title gets a full diagnostic from the experts as they map out how the company can scale, gain visibility, and earn the recognition it deserves nationwide.

programme.title: Around the ACL
programme.desc: ATA 226: Worlds Are Next: Final Rankings & Stevie Award Predictions With the ACL World Championships just around the corner, this week on Around The ACL, Jake, Meesh, and Anthony break down the final Singles rankings and discuss who has positioned themselves as the player to beat heading into the biggest event of the season. From Logan Chamberlain and Colin Hodet to Mark Richards, Zack Aiken, and Gabriel Clauson, the crew debates who has the momentum and who still has something to prove. The show also takes a look at the Pro Invitational teams and what fans should be watching as the sport's top players prepare to battle for a World Championship. To close out the episode, the hosts cast their ballots for the Around The ACL Stevie Awards. They debate the fan-nominated finalists for Game of the Year, Shot of the Year, Breakout Player, Rookie of the Year, and MVP while revisiting some of the biggest moments and performances from an unforgettable ACL season. Join us as we celebrate the season that was and look ahead to the biggest week in cornhole.

programme.title: S1E5 The Jackson Goldstone Story
programme.desc: Beyond Limits: The Jackson Goldstone Story is an electrifying YouTube series that follows mountain biking sensation Jackson Goldstone through his 2023 UCI Downhill World Championship season. Watch as he pushes his limits on some of the most dangerous downhill courses in the world, from steep, rocky descents to twisting forest trails, attacking every challenge with unmatched skill and determination. Go behind the scenes to see the intense training sessions, precise bike tuning, and mental preparation that fuel his success. Experience the rush of high-stakes racing with heart-pounding runs, fierce rivalries, and moments that will keep you holding your breath. More than just the action, Beyond Limits reveals Jackson’s personal journey, the sacrifices he makes for his passion, and the powerful support network that drives him forward. This is the ultimate inside look at a world-class athlete chasing glory on two wheels.

programme.title: S1E1 Moto
programme.desc: Two brothers. Two motorcycles. Ride along with GoPro Family members Carlos and Alex Costa on the adventure of a lifetime as they explore the vibrant cities and stunning beaches of Morocco. Plus, enjoy exclusive bonus footage featuring the very best of GoPro Motorsports.

programme.title: S1E2 Moto
programme.desc: The journey continues as we follow two brothers on their 2,300-kilometer adventure across Morocco. Two brothers. Two motorcycles. Ride along with GoPro Family members Carlos and Alex Costa as they experience vibrant cities, breathtaking beaches, and the adventure of a lifetime. Plus, enjoy bonus footage of Jeremy Seewer. With 50 podiums, 11 victories, 17 race wins, and five FIM Motocross World Championship silver medals, his record is remarkable — yet his story goes far beyond the numbers.

programme.title: S2E1 Moto
programme.desc: Celebrate the women of GoPro, including British rally driver Catie Munnings, who rose to fame after winning the FIA European Rally Championship Ladies Trophy at just 18. Watch snowboarder Alina Hight who made history as the first to land a double backside alley-oop rodeo in a halfpipe competition. Meet Teigan Nash, co-founder of Girls Who Glow, inspiring young women everywhere. Plus, experience even more of the very best from GoPro Motorsports.

programme.title: S3E1 Moto
programme.desc: GoPro Athlete and Formula 1 star Daniel Ricciardo teams up with Race Service Co-Founder James Kirkham for an unforgettable ride through Los Angeles. With eight Grand Prix victories and 32 podiums to his name, the Honey Badger spends his day off behind the wheel of supercars like the Ford GT, racing past Beverly Hills, the Sunset Strip, and into the winding roads of Benedict Canyon. Plus, enjoy even more of the very best from GoPro Motorsports.

programme.title: Hogslayer
programme.desc: The award-winning true-life story of the dual-engine Norton motorcycle dragster designed, built, and raced by TC Christenson and John Gregory of Sunset Motors. The documentary chronicles the Sunset Motors Racing Team’s unrivaled innovation and unbridled courage as they faced unyielding challengers throughout the United States and Europe in the 1970’s. TC and John are featured as they relate their experiences of those years rising from local street racers to the top race team in the world. programme.desc: When a young, inexperienced man is appointed acting sheriff, Lucas McCain must step in to mentor him, guiding the novice lawman through a tense confrontation with a group of reckless outlaws who are testing his mettle.

programme.title: The Wagon Train S3E19 The Benjamin Burns Story
programme.desc: Facing a water shortage, the wagon train follows an old-timer named Benjamin Burns into the desert, hoping he can lead them to a legendary hidden spring. When Burns is injured, scout Flint McCullough and a fearful city-dweller named John Colter must survive the harsh terrain and a hostile Indian party to make it back alive

programme.title: Wagon Train S2E23 The Alexander Portlass Story
programme.desc: When a sophisticated British aristocrat joins the wagon train in search of ancient artifacts, his arrogant demeanor and obsession with his treasures clash with the realities of life on the trail, eventually leading to a tense struggle for survival against hostile desert conditions.

programme.title: Wagon Train S2E21 The Annie Griffith Story
programme.desc: A strong-willed widow traveling with the wagon train faces prejudice and hardship while struggling to protect her children and maintain her independence against both the harsh trail and judgmental fellow travelers

programme.title: Bonanza Season 2 Episode 7 Day of Reckoning
programme.desc: After a Native American man and his wife are ostracized by their tribes and attempt to build a life as farmers on the Ponderosa, a bigoted neighbor’s violent act of revenge triggers a dangerous cycle of vengeance that tests Ben Cartwright’s faith

programme.title: The Price of Power 1969
programme.desc: In The Price of Power, Giuliano Gemma stars in a gripping Spaghetti Western that blends frontier action with political intrigue. Set against the backdrop of President James Garfield’s visit to Texas, a deadly conspiracy unfolds as ruthless enemies plot an assassination. Caught between gunmen, corruption, and betrayal, one man fights to uncover the truth and deliver justice. With explosive shootouts, sweeping style, and echoes of real history, this is a Western where the cost of freedom comes high.

programme.title: Death Valley 1982
programme.desc: In Death Valley, a young boy’s vacation turns into a nightmare when he witnesses a brutal murder in the desert. Trapped in the desolate wilderness with his mother (Catherine Hicks) and her new boyfriend (Paul Le Mat), he becomes the target of a relentless killer. Starring a young Peter Billingsley and Stephen McHattie as the menacing murderer, this suspense-filled thriller blends chilling atmosphere, tense chases, and shocking violence against the unforgiving backdrop of the Arizona desert.

programme.title: Arizona
programme.desc: Perrin is a cowboy who comes to the aid of local Indians being swindled out of their gold. He signs on as a ranch foreman, but learns the ranch is the home of the crooks.

programme.title: The Gabby Hayes Show - Watchmaker
programme.desc: Dramatizing the lives of historical figures, such as the naval commander, the lawman and professional gambler, and the outlaw Belle, tall tales and Western scenes

programme.title: One Eyed Jacks 1961
programme.desc: Marlon Brando directs and stars in One-Eyed Jacks, a gripping Western of betrayal and revenge. As outlaw Rio (Brando) breaks free from prison, he sets his sights on settling the score with his former partner, Dad Longworth (Karl Malden), who double-crossed him years before and now wears the badge of a sheriff. But Rio’s quest for vengeance grows complicated when he falls for Longworth’s spirited daughter, leaving him torn between love and justice. Sweeping vistas, raw emotion, and Brando’s electrifying presence make this a Western unlike any other.

programme.title: Finding Adventure: Military Veteran Surfing for Serenity
programme.desc: Brittany Murphy is a single mother of two in Savannah, GA. Since leaving the military, she has sought peace, calm, and a purpose. Brittany knows that it can be found in nature; she just isn’t sure where to start - lucky for her, Kinga does.

programme.title: Local Love: Dating Is Music To Aurora’s Ears
programme.desc: Young, single, and new to Sacramento, Aurora knows what she wants and goes after it. Three Sacramento bachelors will try to win her over with a day of tango lessons, wood working and a jam session.

programme.title: Hometown Tragedy: A Future Stolen: Finding Justice for Sade Robinson
programme.desc: In Milwaukee, 19-year-old Sade Robinson has gone missing, and her car is found torched. A trail of evidence across the city shocks the community and leaves her family searching for justice.

programme.title: FIXT: Veteran Faces Terrifying Decision
programme.desc: Andrew returned home from serving his country with a toothache so bad he covers his mouth out of habit. Mickey had forgotten how to smile after years of struggle with addiction and abuse. Will the FIXT team help them smile again?

programme.title: Chaos & Kindness : Fulfilling Prom Dreams and Crowning a King and Queen
programme.desc: Ryan and Justin make dreams come true when they throw a second chance prom for the community. Ryan surprises a longtime friend with a promposal, and makes Jimmy Luv a King.
